title: Creating Friends and Foes
description: Explore an overhauled world, fight enhanced monsters, have romantic dinners with your friends, wear cute hats, and Create terrifying fortresses!
body:
Explore an overhauled world, fight enhanced monsters, have romantic dinners with your friends, wear cute hats, and Create terrifying fortresses!

This modpack is intended to create a fun and challenging environment to enhance players creativity and provide a sense of difficulty! 

Caves and Nights are truly dark, and monsters are truly challenging! Progression has been overhauled, thanks to the Spelunkery mod, to provide a slightly more challenging experience overall. 

The Create mod has been included to allow players to *truly* showcase their creativity without limits!


It is recommended to play this modpack with the True Darkness mod enabled.
